---
title: "Catherine Duke Low"
---

## Catherine Duke Low

**Dates:** (b. 1814/5)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Known as Kate Low, she was described by CMY as in her childhood  \'a grown up young lady beyond my horizon\'. She married briefly (28 July 1864) Rev. Henry Low, Dean of Exeter College, Oxford (1808/9-18 Nov 1864) [PB 1914 Crawley Boevey; <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>; 1871 census Tyntesfield 1881 census Bath; 1851 and 1861 censuses in Bath with aunts Susanna and Elizabeth Crawley]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 19th 1877 
- Letter from Jan 8th [or perhaps 6th, 1870]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from Decr 22 [1869]
- Letter from Decr 1st [1869]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from [Late August 1868]
- Letter from May 16th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
